name_en: 🆕m42265 Large Makeup Bag Whether carried by hand, with a shoulder strap, or a scarf, it looks great. Many influencers on Instagram recommend it. Super retro with a large capacity. Paired with a shoulder strap or scarf, it's perfect! The price is perfect too. Carrying a makeup bag out is very trendy. Dimensions: 24×14×17 cm
